[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101010 3
1 1000011101 5
2 0011100011 5
3 1011110100 6
4 0110001011 5
5 1000011101 5

7 1011110100 6

61 16 0001011001 4

04 40 1000011101 5 match 1 5

26 62 1011110100 6 match 3 7
37 73 0110001011 5 match 4
